commands.review_summary:
The PR imports the canonical assistant-visible text sanitizer into Google Chat outbound text and adds tests for stripping internal failed-tool banners while preserving normal prose.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +19. Total +24 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.8 Google Chat use only sanitizeForPlainText, while the canonical assistant-visible sanitizer is the code path that strips compact failed-tool traces. I did not run a live Google Chat replay in this read-only review.
